feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1871 201 1670 81
TR 1722 172 1550 66

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺2.499,99 → ₺699,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺2.499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺699,99

Application Description

Having won over 160 awards and nominations including a BAFTA, Divinity: Original Sin 2 finally comes to Mac. Form a party and experience true branching gameplay with a story unique to each player, in a world filled with evil and abandoned by the gods. Your choices matter, so choose wisely, and know that only one of you can become the new Divine! Warning: before purchasing, please verify if your machine meets the requirements listed below. Features: - Play as one of 5 fantasy races, each with their own personalities and stories: Elves, Dwarves, Lizards, Humans, and the Undead. - Explore a vast world full of loot, treasures, upgrades, and stories with unprecedented branching narratives. - Turn-based combat featuring the elements of nature: combine fire, earth, water, air and everything in between to take down your enemies. - Talk to animals and ghosts to gain unique insights about the world and its secrets. - Up to 4 players online or 2 player split-screen coop. - Hold CMD when launching the game to access language and configuration options. Requirements: to check your Mac model, select "About This Mac" from the Apple menu in your menu bar. OS: - macOS 10.14.2 Mojave (or higher) recommended - macOS 10.13.6 High Sierra supported Supported hardware: - MacBook Pro: all since late 2016 - MacBook Air: all since mid 2017 - iMac: all since late 2014 with Radeon graphics, and all iMacs since mid 2017 - Mac Pro: all since 2019 - Mac mini: all since 2018 - eGPU: all official eGPU modules based on AMD GPUs HDR requirements: - macOS 10.14.2 or higher - Any iMac capable of 500Nits display that supports Automatic Brightness Adjustment.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Astrea: Six-Sided Oracles
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺399,99

Application Description

Astrea is a DICE-deck-building roguelike that flips the script on deckbuilders by using dice instead of cards and an unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption. Features • Unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption - In Astrea there is a new type of “damage” system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or heal yourself. On the other hand, corruption can be used to damage yourself or heal the enemies. Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales. • Dynamic Health Bar system - With skills attached to your health bar, you can take Corruption to enable these skills and unleash powerful abilities. But be careful, if you take too much Corruption you will be consumed by it. • Not cards, but dice! - Build a dice pool that fits your playstyle. Choose from over 350 dice and three dice types; reliably safe, perfectly balanced, or powerfully risky. A dice type system designed with high-risk, high-reward in its core. • Customize your dice - Forge your fate by editing die faces with new actions, tipping the odds of powerful results into your favor. • Choose from Six Brave Oracles - Each possessing their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. From ingenious spellcasters to brutish berserkers, whether you like beating the opponent into submission or outsmarting them with clever plays, there’s an oracle for you. • Uncover over 170 modifying Blessings - Imbue your Oracle with unique passives yielding potent effects that changes up your fundamental tactics. Choose between Star Blessings, passive effects with lower power, or Black Hole Blessings, powerful passive effects with a drawback.

entry.title: Little Nightmares
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺199,99 [₺129,99 ~ ₺399,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺199,99

Application Description

Escape your childhood fears. First available on PC and consoles, the horror adventure tale Little Nightmares is available on mobile!  Immerse yourself in Little Nightmares, a dark whimsical tale that will confront you with your childhood fears! Help Six escape The Maw – a vast, mysterious vessel inhabited by corrupted souls looking for their next meal. As you progress on your journey, explore the most disturbing dollhouse offering a prison to escape from and a playground full of secrets to discover. Reconnect with your inner child to unleash your imagination and find the way out! Little Nightmares features a subtle mix of action and puzzle-platformer mechanics rooted in an eerie artistic direction and creepy sound design. Sneak your way out of the Maw’s dreary maze and run from its corrupted inhabitants to escape your childhood fears. FEATURES - Tiptoe your way through a dark and thrilling adventure - Rediscover your childhood fears inside a haunting vessel and escape its eerie inhabitants - Climb, crawl and hide through nightmarish environments to solve tricky platform puzzles - Immerse yourself in the Maw through its creepy sound design CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE - Revamped interface - Game Center achievements - Compatible with MFi controllers If you run into a problem, please contact us at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/12-playdigious/ with as much information as possible on the issue.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Cello Tuner Professional
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺99,99]
  • Settings：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺99,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺499,99

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：₺49,99
  • Settings：₺49,99

Application Description

Tune your cello instantly with precision and ease! Optimal for beginners, intermediate and advanced musicians! · The most accurate - displays the exact sound frequency in Hz. · Calibration for A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Instant load and fastest tuning! - Optimized for latest devices. · Highest responsiveness and sensitivity. · Intuitive user interface with LED tuning indicator. · Visual indicators - tuned string lights up. · Universal app - works with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch. · Advanced settings (A4 calibration, Mic sensitivity, Sound notifications) and Tuning fork! (as in-app purchases) What our users say: "Does what it promises - Very useful app." "This app makes tuning so easy!" "By far the greatest and most accurate cello tuning app. Play the string, read its chart and you know whether you're in tune." "Amazing! Outstanding, well spent money! "All cellists should have this app!" "It's very useful for me! Thank you!" "Excellent app" "Very convenient software. Suitable for any skill!" --- Please make sure to allow microphone access to this app when prompted. Check it under Settings>Privacy>Microphone. Thank you. --- Got ideas? Questions? Please send us your feedback through our site or to feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: PowNap
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺299,99 [₺149,99 ~ ₺399,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺299,99

Application Description

PowNap Wake up when your body is ready. PowNap is an intelligent power-nap timer for Apple Watch. Instead of rigid time rules, PowNap uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment. You start the nap. PowNap handles detection and wake-up — based on your current physiology. --- Two Modes Power Nap 15, 20, or 25 minutes. - May end earlier if your body recovers sooner - Ends at the selected time at the latest Heart-rate detection with a fixed upper limit. Infinity Nap No time limit. - Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep - Ideal for stress, exhaustion, or when you don’t want a fixed duration Not designed for deep sleep, but for short, measurable recovery. Depending on your heart rate, this may happen after 10–15 minutes — or later. --- Calm. Precise. Distraction-free. - Detects relaxation and falling asleep via heart rate - Wakes you with gentle vibration - No countdown pressure, no unnecessary sound - Subtle progress indicators instead of a classic timer - Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest. --- Adjustable (Optional) - Vibration: Soft, Medium, Strong, or Increasing - Heart-rate threshold: - automatically adjusted to your resting heart rate - or manually set as a percentage Behavior may vary slightly depending on your daily condition. --- Private & Local - One-time purchase — no subscription - No ads, no account, no tracking - No cloud All processing happens locally on your watch. Saving naps to Apple Health is optional. For heart-rate detection, Health permissions (Workout, Heart Rate, Sleep) are required. Without them, heart-rate-based nap control is not available. --- Important Notes - PowNap is not a medical device - For continuous heart-rate tracking, PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout session (required by watchOS) As a result, exercise minutes are counted and Activity Rings are affected. This behavior is system-controlled and cannot be undone. --- Buy once. No conditions. Just calm, focused recovery. --- Short FAQ Why does PowNap start a workout? - watchOS only allows continuous heart-rate tracking during an active workout. Does PowNap fake activity or calories? - No. All values come directly from watchOS. Does PowNap affect Activity Rings? - Yes, while the workout is active — this is system behavior. Infinity = deep sleep? - No. Infinity Nap is for short recovery, not deep or long sleep. --- Apple Watch Compatibility Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE). Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

entry.title: Dungeon Survival
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Sack of Gems：₺49,99
  • Barrel of Gems：₺249,99
  • Gift of the King：₺799,99
  • The Dragon Queen's treasure：₺1.499,99
  • Diamond Treasury：₺4.999,99

Application Description

[*] Game Features - Cave levels are randomly generated, providing a new experience each time you play! - Hundreds of monsters to defeat! - Hundreds of equipment to collect! - Hundreds of quests and achievements to conquer! - Enchant, Reform, Level up, and collect Gold! An abundant new world to explore! [*] Back Story Black Haze is a border town renown for its rich mineral deposits, which has fallen on hard times of late. In this city, it is difficult to tell the difference between good and evil. Following the mysterious disappearance of the former lord, the fragile balance of the city is disrupted. You are Royde, and you have been chosen by the king to bring balance back to Black Haze and investigate the strange reports that have come from the city. [*] Battle & Classes - 9 classes, each with unique skills. Build your party however you choose. - Intricate turn-based combat lets you become the master of the battlefield - Characters develop traits that can help or hinder. You must decide how to use them. [*] Maps & Monsters - Follow the story or venture off on your own to bring your enemies to justice. - Challenging enemies will keep you on your toes. Do not underestimate them or it will mean your destruction. - Rare and powerful enemies will challenge you. Defeat them to collect precious loot and prove your valor. [*] Contact Us Please contact us with any question, suggestions, concern, or advice! Support Email: 54276264@qq.com FACEBOOK: https://goo.gl/zPtps1

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Demumu: Are You Dead?
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺199,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺399,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺199,99

Application Description

A lightweight safety tool crafted for solo dwellers, establishing invisible safety protection through check-in monitoring and emergency contact mechanisms to make solitary life more reassuring · Automatic Notification for Unchecked-In Days · Set up one emergency contact (family member or friend) in advance. If you haven’t checked in via the app for consecutive days, the system will automatically send an email to them the next day to promptly convey safety anomalies and gain critical intervention time for potential risks · Effortless Setup & Use · No registration or login required. Simply enter the contact’s name and email to complete setup on first use. Tap to check in daily, with the background automatically monitoring your status without disturbing daily routines to ensure easy and convenient operation · Strict Privacy Protection · Uses encryption technology to safeguard emergency contact information and check-in records. Refuses to collect irrelevant permissions like location, eliminating privacy leakage risks and ensuring personal information security for trustworthy safety guardianship · For All Solo Dwellers · Whether you’re a solo office worker, a student living away from home, or anyone choosing a solitary lifestyle, Demumu serves as your safety companion: daily check-ins signal safety, while abnormal situations trigger early notifications to give those who care about you peace of mind and add a layer of protection for yourself Alone but not lonely, safety by your side. Protect every solitary moment with simple solutions and build a solid safety line for solo living User Agreement: https://Moonscape.cc/Demumu/UserAgreement.html Privacy Policy: https://Moonscape.cc/Demumu/PrivacyPolicy.html Official Email: Demumuofficial@nexun.vip Demumu Team

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Solar Arc – Sun & Moon Tracker
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Golden hour happens every single day. Most people miss it. Solar Arc makes sure you do not. - Chasing golden hour for a photo? Know the exact minute it starts. - Planning a sunrise hike? See the best trail windows at a glance. - Wondering when the moon rises tonight? It is right there on your screen. SolarArc is a sun and moon tracker that feels like looking out the window. Every view shifts with the real sky — warm when the light is warm, dark when the sky is dark. It is not a data app you check. It is a sky app you feel. ARC MODE The sun and moon traced across your sky in real time. Watch them rise, climb, and fall against a live gradient that shifts with the actual light outside your window. View the sun alone, the moon alone, or both together. GRADIENT MODE Your entire day, painted in one line. Dawn amber bleeds into midday blue, then sunset orange, then deep navy night. Golden hour glows. Blue hour cools. You do not need to read a single number — just look at the color and know where you are in the day. LUNAR TRACKING Know when to look up. SolarArc renders tonight's moon with the correct phase shape on the arc. Plan around full moons. Catch a crescent at dusk. Know exactly how dark the sky will be. 52-WEEK FORECAST What will golden hour look like three Saturdays from now? How much daylight will you have on that hiking trip in April? Pick any date in the next year and see the full picture — sun, moon, and light — before you commit. FIVE WAYS TO USE THE SKY Photography — Golden hour and blue hour, down to the minute. Stop guessing when to shoot. Hiking — Best trail windows and how much daylight is left. Know when to turn around. Screens — A screen curfew that follows the sun. Wind down with the sky, not against it. Gardening — When to water, when to protect, and how many sun hours your plants get today. Stargazing — When true darkness begins. The best window to see everything above you. FEATURES - Live gradient line and arc visualizations - Sun view, moon view, or dual view - Golden hour and blue hour timing - Moonrise, moonset, phase, and illumination - 52-week forecast for any date - Five activity modes - Medium and large home screen widgets - Notifications for sunrise, sunset, and golden hour - Multi-location with automatic timezone handling - Built on NOAA solar and Meeus lunar algorithms - Fully offline. No tracking. No account required. WHAT IS GOLDEN HOUR? Golden hour is the short window after sunrise and before sunset when the light turns soft, warm, and directional. Photographers chase it. Hikers love it. Solar Arc tells you exactly when it happens, wherever you are. -- One purchase. No subscription. No ads. Yours forever. Questions or ideas? hello@spruzzolabs.com

entry.title: TRINITY TRIGGER
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

Application Description

　　　[Caution] Before purchasing or using this application, please be sure to read the [Notes on this application] at the bottom of the page. As Cyan, a young man burdened by the gods with the mantle of Warrior of Chaos and an inevitable clash against the Warrior of Order, players will set out on a grand adventure to defy fate and save Trinitia. Cyan and his companions Elise and Zantis are accompanied by strange creatures known as Triggers that can transform into eight types of weapons, and players can switch freely between the three characters to implement a solo combat strategy Together, they will write a new destiny. Master the Weapons of the Gods Solve puzzles and defeat enemies traverse the dungeons of each Arma, towers made from the fallen weapons of the gods. Seek Out Trinitia’s Mysteries Reveal hidden passages by exploring every last bit of Trinitia’s diverse biomes. Chat with townsfolk for clues to uncover the heavily guarded secrets held in these forests, deserts, snowfields, and more. Change the Tide of Battle Make expert use of the Weapon Wheel in battle to change between eight weapon types on the fly. Every enemy has a weakness—finding and exploiting it is the key to victory. A Generational Role-Playing Epic Trinity Trigger was inspired by the iconic RPGs of yesteryear, but its accessible and rewarding gameplay incorporates modern flourishes to make it an exciting new adventure for players of all ages. [Notes on this application] ▼△▼ Operating Environment ▼△▼ iOS 12.0 or later *Only officially released operating systems are supported. We do not guarantee that you will be able to play the game comfortably. ▼△▼ Recommended Devices ▼△▼ iPhone 11 or later, iPad 7th generation or later Internal memory (RAM): 2GB or more ▼△▼ Recommended Play ▼△▼ This application has an auto-save function, However, in order to avoid unexpected situations, it is recommended to “save often”. Starting the application while multiple applications are running may cause unstable operation. To ensure stable play, we recommend that you play the game with other apps down. ▼△▼ Disclaimer ▼△▼ 1. Please note that support will not be provided for operation on OS versions other than the supported OS versions. 2. due to customer usage conditions and model-specific factors, even with a compatible model, operation may be unstable or may not work properly. 3. Even if “iOSXXX or higher” is listed as the supported OS version, it does not necessarily mean that the latest version is supported. 4. It may take some time to start the game after the application is launched depending on the model. 5. A frame may appear on the screen depending on the model. Refunds (including exchanges for other products or services) will not be accepted for any reason. © FURYU Corporation.

entry.title: EarthBeat - Schumann Resonance
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Yearly Subscription：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺179,99 ~ ₺499,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

In-App Purchases

  • Yearly Subscription：₺399,99
  • Monthly Subscription：₺99,99

Application Description

"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration." -Nikola Tesla KEY FEATURES: - Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app - Customizable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center - Real-time aurora prediction with full map view - Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro) - Advanced burst analysis and notifications (EarthBeat Pro) - Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro) - Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro) - Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages) Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity. EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) data. The GCP displays as a 3D colored indicator reflecting global consciousness patterns. Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP Dot Widget displays consciousness patterns. New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom. EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, and 10-week archive for tracking patterns. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development. Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields. Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian. If you'd like to see additional data sources or have widget ideas, please get in touch. All displayed images are copyright-protected and belong to their respective sources indicated in the app. Privacy Policy: https://asv.pt/earthbeat-privacy-policy/ Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
